description: Create a SQL query named 'DiverseCustomerReport' in the Chinook database to identify customers who have purchased tracks from 5 or more distinct genres. The query should return two columns: 'CustomerName' (First Name and Last Name concatenated with a space) and 'DiversityRating' (the count of distinct genres followed by the text ' Genres'). Sort the results by the genre count in descending order.
